text.text: I had a great experience at this dental office. Dr. Sulejmani is very professional, kind, and takes the time to explain every step of the treatment. He works with great care, making sure that I feel comfortable and relaxed throughout the procedure. The office is clean and welcoming, and it’s clear that he truly cares about his patients. I highly recommend him to anyone looking for a skilled and trustworthy dentist. 😃🦷

text.text: I had an amazing experience at this dental clinic in Ulcinj, Montenegro. I came for teeth whitening and composite veneers, and I am beyond satisfied with the results – my smile looks fantastic! The doctor was extremely professional, kind, and very charming, which made me feel completely comfortable and relaxed throughout the whole process. The clinic itself has a very welcoming atmosphere, and the price-performance ratio is absolutely excellent. I am already looking forward to coming back for my next holiday and continuing my dental treatments here. Highly recommended!

text.text:
I flew all the way from Switzerland to Montenegro to visit Reident Ulcinj – and it was absolutely worth it! The service was extremely fast, professional, and friendly. I had Composite Bonding done to close the gap between my teeth, and it turned out really nice and natural. The entire process was smooth and efficient, and the clinic itself is modern and very well maintained.

Highly recommended for anyone looking for high-quality dental care at an excellent value. I will definitely come back!

originalText.text:

I had Composite Bonding done to close the gap between my teeth, and it turned out really nice and natural. The entire process was smooth and efficient, and the clinic itself is modern and very well maintained.

Highly recommended for anyone looking for high-quality dental care at an excellent value. I will definitely come back!

text.text: I came here for a routine check and clean. As an Australian I had never gotten dentistry services outside Australia before. He speaks really great English and made me feel at ease. Highly recommend!

Habe eine zahnreinigung & Zahn bleeching sowie am Ende noch eine Krone am vorderen Zahn machen lassen. Mein Zahn wurde damit identisch zu den anderen aufgebaut.

text.text: Nakon sto sam uradio cirkon most, zaista sam zadovoljan rezultatom. Zubi izgledaju prirodno, kao da nikada nisam imao problema. Sve je savrseno uskladjeno, a funkcionalnost je sada kao kod mojih pravih zuba. Prije nego sto sam se odlucio na most, imao sam strah i sumnje, ali sada mogu reci da je to bila odlicna odluka. Oseacm se sigurnije kada govorim i jedem, a osmeh mi je sada kompletan. Drago mi je da sam se odlucio na ovaj korak, jer je resenje dugotrajno i pruaz mi kvalitet zivota koji sam zelio. Svima prepurucujem Reident jer zaista je uradio sve precizno.

text.text:
Fortuna je zaslužna što sam bas dr Reshitu povjerio dugo odlagan,a neizbjezan zahvat ugradnje keramičkog mosta.
Malo je reći da sam prezadovoljan učinkom,zubi su legli od samog početka kao da su prirodno moji.
Ljubaznost,odnos prema pacijentu,a nadasve stručnost su opredjelile da baš on postane odabrani stomatolog moje porodice.
Toplo preporučujem.

But to my surprise I found the Dental Clinic REIDENT and got an excellent service at good price. Dt. Reshit is very professional and kind dentist. He worked for 40 minutes on my tooth and fixed very well.
Thanks
